canonical_terms.host_level_orchestration_context: Task framing or operator intent emitted outside the repo.
canonical_terms.repo_local_truth: Facts stored in repo-local runtime/config/docs and the authoritative AIAST core docs.
canonical_terms.runtime_system_boundary: Runtime code must remain independent from _system/.
canonical_terms.tool_overlay: A tool-specific adapter or rules layer that sits on top of the repo-local core.
canonical_terms.workspace_authority: For downstream repos, authority is the working-directory copy, not parent/global shims.

conflict_resolution.adapter_conflicts: Tool-specific overlays may add workflow detail but must not contradict the shared repo-local core.
conflict_resolution.fact_conflicts: Favor repo-local runtime and product truth over generic host assumptions.
conflict_resolution.host_overwrite_policy: Host systems must not silently overwrite repo-local truth.
conflict_resolution.rule_conflicts: Favor the repo-local AIAST core over tool overlays, prompt emission surfaces, and host-level orchestration context.

precedence_layers.description: Runtime code, config, migrations, schemas, tests, deployment files, and repo-owned product docs.
precedence_layers.name: repo_runtime_and_product_truth

precedence_layers.description: AGENTS.md plus the authoritative repo-local AIAST contract files.
precedence_layers.name: repo_local_aiaast_core

precedence_layers.description: Tool adapter files and tool-local rules that extend but do not replace the shared repo contract.
precedence_layers.name: tool_specific_overlays

precedence_layers.description: Prompt templates, prompt packs, and the prompt emission contract.
precedence_layers.name: repo_local_prompt_emission_surfaces

precedence_layers.description: External orchestration prompts, wrappers, or agent-host context supplied outside the repo.
precedence_layers.name: host_level_orchestration_context
